sections.paragraph:
verb לקום

to rise, stand up; wake up; get to, start; be established; to occur, happen, take place; attack; rebel, rise against; hold on

verb לנקום

to avenge, revenge, retaliate

verb להקים

to raise, cause to stand up; awake; cause, stir up; establish, erect, pitch; set up; fulfill; cause to rebel, stir up

verb הוקם

be raised, made to stand up; awaken; caused, stirred up; be established, erected; set up; fulfilled

masculine noun

enemy, foe
